'''鈭歱-v-dh-y''' ('''kapavdheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:footfault|footfault]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:footfault|footfault]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-v-dh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kapavdheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipavdheyoko|thipavdheyoko]] || [[word:jipavdheyoko|jipavdheyoko]] || [[word:shipavdheyoko|shipavdheyoko]] || [[word:kipavdheyoko|kipavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupavdheyoko|thuthupavdheyoko]] || [[word:jujupavdheyoko|jujupavdheyoko]] || [[word:shushupavdheyoko|shushupavdheyoko]] || [[word:kukupavdheyoko|kukupavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupavdheyoko|thupavdheyoko]] || [[word:jupavdheyoko|jupavdheyoko]] || [[word:shupavdheyoko|shupavdheyoko]] || [[word:kupavdheyoko|kupavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupavdheyoko|thupavdheyoko]] || [[word:jupavdheyoko|jupavdheyoko]] || [[word:shupavdheyoko|shupavdheyoko]] || [[word:kupavdheyoko|kupavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepavdheyoko|thepavdheyoko]] || [[word:jepavdheyoko|jepavdheyoko]] || [[word:shepavdheyoko|shepavdheyoko]] || [[word:kepavdheyoko|kepavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopavdheyoko|thothopavdheyoko]] || [[word:jojopavdheyoko|jojopavdheyoko]] || [[word:shoshopavdheyoko|shoshopavdheyoko]] || [[word:kokopavdheyoko|kokopavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopavdheyoko|thopavdheyoko]] || [[word:jopavdheyoko|jopavdheyoko]] || [[word:shopavdheyoko|shopavdheyoko]] || [[word:kopavdheyoko|kopavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopavdheyoko|thopavdheyoko]] || [[word:jopavdheyoko|jopavdheyoko]] || [[word:shopavdheyoko|shopavdheyoko]] || [[word:kopavdheyoko|kopavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pavdheyoko|th忙pavdheyoko]] || [[word:j忙pavdheyoko|j忙pavdheyoko]] || [[word:sh忙pavdheyoko|sh忙pavdheyoko]] || [[word:k忙pavdheyoko|k忙pavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapavdheyoko|thathapavdheyoko]] || [[word:jajapavdheyoko|jajapavdheyoko]] || [[word:shashapavdheyoko|shashapavdheyoko]] || [[word:kakapavdheyoko|kakapavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapavdheyoko|thapavdheyoko]] || [[word:japavdheyoko|japavdheyoko]] || [[word:shapavdheyoko|shapavdheyoko]] || [[word:kapavdheyoko|kapavdheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapavdheyoko|thapavdheyoko]] || [[word:japavdheyoko|japavdheyoko]] || [[word:shapavdheyoko|shapavdheyoko]] || [[word:kapavdheyoko|kapavdheyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
